expected_outcome: Competent SQL writer capable of structuring relational database schemas, writing complex JOIN operations, compiling aggregates, and optimizing search indexes.

topics.name: Databases & Tables DDL
subtopics: Primary Keys and Foreign Keys constraints
Alter table and column data types

topics.name: Selecting & Filtering Data
subtopics: WHERE clause filtering and Operators (AND, OR, NOT)
LIKE wildcard searches, IN and BETWEEN filters

phases.practice_schedule: 1 Hour daily writing SELECT statements and database table definitions.

mini_project.title: Store Database Schema outline
mini_project.description: Design tables for Customers, Products, and Orders with correct primary and foreign key constraints.

phases.milestone: Mastered basic database table creations, data types definitions, and row filtering syntax.

topics.name: JOIN operations
subtopics: INNER JOIN and OUTER JOIN (LEFT, RIGHT, FULL)

topics.name: Aggregations & Grouping
subtopics: Aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX)

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing joins across multiple tables and aggregating results.

mini_project.title: Business Performance Reports
mini_project.description: Write a report summarizing sales metrics: total revenue per product, customer transaction totals, and averages.

phases.milestone: Proficient in joining relational datasets, grouping data elements, and applying summary aggregates.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing analytical window scripts and creating indexes.

mini_project.title: Employee Ranking Dashboard Query
mini_project.description: Write a complex CTE query that ranks employee salaries per department, maps managers names, and flags anomalies.

phases.milestone: Equipped to resolve complex data analytics structures, write nested operations, and improve search performances.

major_projects.title: E-Commerce Transaction Audit System
major_projects.description: Design an audit database mapping orders history, billing addresses, discounts, and payments logs, complete with optimized indexes and analytical queries.
